data.name: Vicious Lash
data.description:
You conjure a whip of raw torment and lash it in a 5-foot-wideline extending from you to a creature within range. Make amelee spell attack against the creature. On a hit, the target takes 2d6 Thunder damage.
Hit or miss, the target and each creature in the linebetween you and it must succeed on a Dexterity saving throwor take 2d6 psychic damage.
data.forHigherLevels: Both the Thunder and Psychic damage increase by 1d6, and the spell’s range increases by 10 feet for each slot level above 1st.
